rooms.name: Mistveil Temple
rooms.description: A labyrinthine complex shrouded in mist that refuses to lift, no matter the dawn. Exits: 'north', 'east'.

rooms.name: Emberfall Gorge
rooms.description: Scorched earth and smoldering rocks hide ancient secrets beneath ash-filled clefts. Exits: 'west', 'north'.

rooms.name: Echoing Falls
rooms.description: Fog-shrouded waterfalls whisper forgotten melodies into an eerie silence. Exits: 'south', 'east', 'north'.

rooms.name: Riven Ridge
rooms.description: A jagged outcropping of stone splits the sky with a perpetual, screaming wind. Exits: 'west', 'south'.

rooms.name: Shadowhaven Cove
rooms.description: Darkness clings to this foreboding shore like a damp shroud. Exits: 'south'.

items.name: Voidstone Dagger
items.description: A blade that drinks light and whispers of forgotten names forged in the heart of Emberfall Gorge.

items.name: Flask of Moonfire
items.description: Liquid starlight swirls within; one sip mends shattered flesh distilled by the Mistveil Temple's priests.

items.name: Gravewarden Shield
items.description: A shield etched with the names of every warrior who ever carried it, crafted to bear the weight of history.

items.name: Sorrowstone Chalice
items.description: Elegant curves contain a poison so potent it was used to anoint kings and seal their fate.

items.name: Nightwalker Cloak
items.description: Woven from shadows that cling to the wearer, granting stealth in the darkest depths.

npcs.name: Mira the Undying
npcs.description: A pale merchant who sells only by candlelight and never blinks.
npcs.dialogue: Come closer, traveler; I carry wares that tempt even the bravest hearts.

npcs.name: Grask the Bone-Render
npcs.description: A skeleton animated by dark sorcery, its joints wrapped in rusted chain.
npcs.dialogue: Your bones will soon join my collection as a tribute to darkness.

npcs.name: Elara of the Mire
npcs.description: A swamp-witch whose eyes hold centuries of cold, patient malice.
npcs.dialogue: In the heart of Blood Mire lies an ancient, glowing artifact hidden from prying eyes.

npcs.name: The Wraithkeeper
npcs.description: An eerie figure clad in tattered robes that seem to be sewn from whispers and forgotten memories.

quests.name: The Sunken Compass Quest
quests.description: Retrieve the navigator's lost compass from the depths of Riven Ridge, said to hold the secrets of our ancient forebears.

quests.name: The Bone-Render's Bane
quests.description: Defeat Grask the Bone-Render haunting Mistveil Temple to lift the curse and free its trapped spirits.

player.name: Arin
player.description: A brave young warrior with a sharp mind and sharper blade.
